name: python3-discovery
title: python3-discovery
description:
Python interpreter discovery - Python Library
You may have multiple Python versions installed on your machine – system
Python, versions from pyenv, mise, asdf, or uv. python-discovery finds the
right one for you.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-discovery because Python interpreter discovery - Python Library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-discovery as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-discovery with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-discovery --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
